settings.title: Personal settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences that belong to you, not to one server
settings.save_failed: Could not save your personal settings

home.title: Home server
home.description: Your home server stores the preferences and server list that follow you between Chatto clients. Passwords and sign-in tokens stay on this device.
home.add_server_first: Add and sign in to a server before choosing a home server.
home.choose_prompt: Choose which of your servers should keep your personal data.
